title: Raid Bar
description: The Locator Bar shows where Pillagers are during raids and at outposts!
body:
Raids are so boring when you need to find a pillager hiding in a cave!
This mod makes **pillagers appear on the locator bar** so you can easily find them.

When using the datapack version make sure to also download the [resource pack ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9cF1x9Wu/versions/3GUBFQug/raid-bar-resourcepack-v0.1-1.21.6.zip).
You don't need it when using the mod version.
